item.title: Best Meta Loadouts for Black Ops 7 Season 3 Reloaded
item.description:
Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 3 Reloaded takes players to familiar battlegrounds with the return of Summit, along with some exciting modes like Freerun that bring in free rewards. However, the meta has shifted once again with a string of new weapon updates. With that being said, here are the best weapon loadouts to use for Black Ops 7 Multiplayer’s Season 3 Reloaded.

Best Voyak KT-3 Loadout

The Voyak KT-3 is currently one of the most dominant Assault Rifles in the meta, so much so that it is also restricted in Ranked. With an incredibly fast TTK, there’s no reason not to run it in public matches, though there is a bit of horizontal recoil to take note of. It’s versatile for close and medium range, so be sure to use the setup below to dominate your matches.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • Lethal Tools ELO (Optic)
    • 20'' Danko Barrel (Barrel)
    • Force Stabilizer Handstop (Underbarrel)
    • Linguard Casket Mag (Magazine)
    • Buffer Spring (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • SWF Tinishia-11 (Muzzle)
    • Crisis-Q Grip (Rear Grip)
    • Bowen Tread Pad (Stock)

Best Carbon 57 Loadout

The Carbon 57 is actually one of the only weapons to see a major buff for Season 3 Reloaded , mainly for its Prestige Attachment, which is now actually viable. With the MFS Renown Plus Magazine, players get a 20% boost in damage range, along with an improvement to recoil control. For those looking for an SMG with a bit more versatility at range, along with a large magazine size, you can’t go wrong with the Carbon 57.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • 8.6'' Orbital Light Barrel (Barrel)
    • Lateral Precision Grip (Underbarrel)
    • MFS Renown Plus Mag (Magazine)
    • Hammer Platoon Pad (Stock)
    • Accelerated Recoil System (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • Lethal Tools ELO (Optic)
    • K&S Stalker 57-X (Muzzle)
    • Bombus Quick Grip (Rear Grip)

Best Kogot-7 Loadout

When it comes to the fastest-killing weapons in Black Ops 7 , the Kogot-7 is still one of the top options to use. There is a bit of horizontal recoil to get under control, but with the ability to shred up close, along with excellent handling and mobilit y, the Kogot-7 stands out from the crowd.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • 13.5'' Canis-05 Barrel (Barrel)
    • VAS Drift Lock Foregrip (Underbarrel)
    • Fortune Extended Mag (Magazine)
    • Spotted Agile Grip (Rear Grip)
    • Buffer Spring (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • Lethal Tool ELO (Optic)
    • SWF Tinishia-11 (Muzzle)
    • Targil Orbiter Stock (Stock)

Best MXR-17 Loadout

The MXR-17 is a weapon that has been pretty reliable for quite some time, and is a great option to consider for Season 3. In Multiplayer, the MXR-17 is heavy-hitting and reliable at long range, though it is notably slower and has fewer bullets per magazine by default than most weapons. For a solid all-rounder though, it’s a good Assault Rifle in the meta.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • 20'' Imperial Barrel (Barrel)
    • Lateral Precision Grip (Underbarrel)
    • Vault Extended Mag (Magazine)
    • Celebrity Grip (Rear Grip)
    • Recoil Sync Unit (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • Lethal Tools ELO (Optic)
    • Greaves TI-762 (Muzzle)
    • GAIT Lux Stock (Stock)

Best Swordfish A1 Loadout

A burst-fire weapon may not be everyone’s favorite choice, but there is no denying that the Swordfish A1 is still a meta pick for Multiplayer. With the ability to one-shot at 10 meters , along with up to 25 meters if there is at least one headshot, and a reliable two-shot beyond that point , it is a deadly weapon in the right hands. While it relies on a keen level of accuracy, for highly skilled players it’s a must-use.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • Lethal Tools ELO (Optic)
    • RL-5.56 Brake (Muzzle)
    • 15.1'' Spatha Barrel (Barrel)
    • Modus-R Underbarrel (Underbarrel)
    • Bolt Carrier Group (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • RO-G Speed Mag (Magazine)
    • R1-Splendor Grip (Rear Grip)
    • Bosun Light Stock (Stock)

Best Peacekeeper MK1 Loadout

Looking for a fast-killing Assault Rifle that performs well up close? Then the Peacekeeper MK1 is a good pick. This weapon received a buff to its horizontal recoil control at the start of Season 3 and has been left virtually untouched since then. With a solid TTK, it’s a great option in the meta. Just don’t expect it to beam players at 50 meters.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • K&S Stalker 57-X (Muzzle)
    • 23.5'' Longbow Barrel (Barrel)
    • Lateral Precision Grip (Underbarrel)
    • Vulcan Reach Extension (Magazine)
    • Buffer Spring (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • Lethal Tools ELO (Optic)
    • Rapid Lock Grip (Rear Grip)
    • Vagrant-93 Stock (Stock)

Best Sturmwolf 45 Loadout

The Sturmwolf 45 is still an excellent choice for Multiplayer in Season 3 Reloaded, and it’s easy to see why. With the right build, players can get an SMG with laser-accurate hipfire accuracy , followed by the ability to perform well within the 10 to 25-meter range. It may not be the absolute fastest-killing SMG in the game, but for versatility, it’s a meta option.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • Hawker Hybrid .45 (Muzzle)
    • 14.8'' Perigee Barrel (Barrel)
    • Envoy Foregrip (Underbarrel)
    • Locus Extended Mag (Magazine)
    • Recoil Spring Assembly (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • Lethal Tools ELO (Optic)
    • Sanctum Speed Grip (Rear Grip)
    • Itinerant Light Stock (Stock)

Best AK-27 Loadout

Last up is the AK-27, a meta contender in Warzone , with the same being the case for Multiplayer. For Season 3 specifically, the AK-27 has not received any notable buffs, though it does have some noticeable bounce in its recoil pattern. However, with the right setup, it’s an accurate and heavy-hitting option for almost any range.

  • 5 Attachment Build:

    • Lethal Tools ELO (Optic)
    • 18.2'' Vostok Extended Barrel (Barrel)
    • VAS Convergence Foregrip (Underbarrel)
    • Epitaph Extended Mag (Magazine)
    • Buffer Spring (Fire Mods)

  • Optional Attachments with Gunfighter:

    • SWF Tinishia-11 (Muzzle)
    • Lithe Thin Grip (Rear Grip)
    • Viktor 7-R Stock (Stock)

Call of Duty: Black Ops 7
Released
November 14, 2025

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

ESRB

item.title: Steam Users Have 24 Hours to Get $236 Worth of Management Sim Games for as Little as $12
item.description:
Steam users who pick up the hilariously titled "Speak to the Manager" Humble Bundle receive 8 varied management games, plus two DLCs, for just $12—when these games, collectively, are worth $236. It's hard to find a better deal than that, especially when players are not just getting a solid collection of management and strategy games, but are also contributing to a good cause as well. However, they'll want to act quickly—this bundle ends on May 8.

Humble Bundle's Speak to the Manager bundle includes 10 Steam keys (for 8 games and 2 DLC), which can be purchased for as little as $12 or more—with the proceeds going to a charity. The charity of choice here is Gold Star Gamers (more info below), so players are encouraged to give more if possible in exchange for these games. It should also be noted that this Humble Bundle can be reduced to 5 games for just $9.

Gold Star Gamer s' mission is to help children who have lost a military or veteran parent find hope and healing through gaming. Our programs include peer support, mentorship, memorials, salutes to service, holiday parties, workforce development, gaming tournaments, resiliency training, and more. As of this writing, this Bundle has raised over $12,00 for GSG. To learn more about Gold Star Gamers, please visit the charity's website.

Humble Bundle's Speak to the Manager Bundle is 9 Games, 1 DLC, and Support for a Good Cause for Just $12

  • Good Company
  • Empires of the Undergrowth
  • The Colonists
  • The Colonists: New Lands DLC
  • Lawn Mowing Simulator
  • Endzone - A World Apart Complete Edition
  • Gladiator Guild Manager
  • Sweet Transit
  • Rise of Industry
  • Rise of Industry: 2130 DLC

The headlining trio of games— Empires of the Undergrowth, The Colonists, and Good Company —show how much variety there is in this bundle of management sims and strategy games. For example, Empires of the Undergrowth is a real-time strategy game where players manage a colony of ants, and The Colonists is about establishing an interstellar home for "human-envious robots." On the other side of the spectrum is Good Company , a management sim where players work to make the most optimized company in the world.

Drag weapons to fill the grid

Loadout Logic

Tap on a weapon to rotate it or press R while dragging.

Time —
Filled 0/36

Results

0
—
More Games
Drag weapons to fill the grid
EasyMediumHard

Loadout Logic

Tap on a weapon to rotate it or press R while dragging.
Time —
Filled 0/36
Results
0
—
More Games

Of course, those who want to contribute to a good cause but do not want or cannot afford all of these games can chop it down to 5 for just $7. This still nets Endzone, Gladiator Guild Manager, Sweet Transit, Rise of Industry , and the Rise of Industry: 2130 DLC. Whatever someone chooses to contribute, there's hardly a better cause than supporting the children of military service members.

REMINDER: The Speak to the Manager Bundle Ends on May 8. Furthermore, the associated Steam Keys will expire if not claimed immediately, lasting for 1 year until May 8, 2027.

Empires of the Undergrowth

Empires of the Undergrowth is a real-time strategy colony simulation game that puts you in control of an ant nest, where survival depends on expansion, resource gathering, and tactical warfare against rival insect colonies. Instead of traditional base-building, gameplay revolves around evolving your queen, managing castes of ants, and coordinating large-scale battles in a constantly shifting underground ecosystem. It mixes documentary-style storytelling with RTS mechanics, letting you experience the life cycle of an ant empire from small beginnings to ecological dominance.

The Colonists

The Colonists delivers a relaxing yet complex settlement-building experience inspired by classic automation and logistics sims, where you guide self-replicating robots as they colonize new worlds. Players construct production chains, manage resource transportation networks, and gradually evolve from simple wooden-age tools to advanced futuristic infrastructure. The gameplay emphasizes long-term planning, efficient routing, and expanding colonies across procedurally generated maps, making it a thoughtful blend of city-building and automation puzzle design.

The Colonists: New Lands DLC

The Colonists – New Lands expands the original experience with additional scenarios, new environments, and fresh challenges that deepen the automation-focused gameplay loop. It enhances the core colonization mechanics by introducing more varied mission structures and refined progression systems, giving players more strategic ways to optimize robot societies.

Good Company

Good Company is a deep factory and business management simulation where you build a tech corporation from the ground up, turning a small startup into a fully automated production powerhouse. Players design complex manufacturing lines, manage employee logistics, and optimize workflows while producing and selling tech products in a dynamic marketplace. With its focus on efficiency, automation, and corporate growth, the game blends sandbox creativity with structured tycoon progression as you expand facilities, improve production systems, and compete for market dominance.

Lawn Mowing Simulator

Lawn Mowing Simulator is a surprisingly detailed simulation game that recreates the experience of running a professional landscaping business across realistic British countryside environments. Players operate licensed real-world lawnmowers, manage contracts, maintain equipment, and grow their business reputation through carefully executed mowing jobs. With its focus on realism, vehicle handling physics, and satisfying grass-cutting mechanics, it turns an everyday task into a calm, career-driven simulation experience.

Endzone - A World Apart Complete Edition

Endzone – A World Apart: Complete Edition is a post-apocalyptic survival city builder where humanity rebuilds civilization after a global nuclear disaster, dealing with radiation, scarcity, and harsh environmental conditions. Players must construct and manage settlements, secure water and energy supplies, and guide survivors through constant threats like toxic rain and resource collapse. The Complete Edition enhances the experience with expanded content, adding more depth to survival systems, exploration, and long-term colony sustainability.

GameRant Quiz

—

QUESTION 1/1

Results

0

—

More Games
GameRant Quiz
Easy (15s)Medium (10s)Hard (5s)
—
QUESTION 1/1
Results
0
—
More Games

Gladiator Guild Manager

Gladiator Guild Manager is a strategy management sim where you recruit, train, and command teams of gladiators competing in tactical arena battles. Rather than direct combat control, players focus on squad composition, skill development, and strategic decision-making between fights to climb competitive leagues. It combines RPG-style progression with management mechanics, letting you build a powerful guild while adapting tactics to different opponents and evolving challenges.

Sweet Transit

Sweet Transit is a unique transport-focused city builder where railways are the foundation of every growing settlement, connecting villages and industries into expanding civilizations. Players design intricate train networks, balance supply chains, and guide societies from rural communities into industrialized cities driven entirely by rail logistics. Its gameplay blends automation, transportation planning, and city growth into a cohesive system where every rail line directly shapes economic development.

Rise of Industry

Rise of Industry is a classic tycoon-style business simulation that challenges players to build and manage an industrial empire across evolving historical eras. You establish production chains, optimize supply routes, and respond to shifting market demands while expanding your corporate reach. The game emphasizes strategic planning, resource management, and economic efficiency as you grow from small-scale manufacturing into a global industrial powerhouse.

Rise of Industry: 2130 DLC

Rise of Industry 2130 shifts the series into a futuristic setting where corporations dominate space-age economies and advanced technologies reshape industrial production. It builds on the original game’s tycoon mechanics while introducing futuristic production systems, higher-tech logistics, and expanded economic complexity across a galaxy-spanning industry network.

item.title: Oscar Winning Actress Reveals She is a Massive Zelda Fan
item.description:
There are a lot of Legend of Zelda fans in the world, and it turns out that Oscar-winning actress Sally Field is among those ranks. Over the years, The Legend of Zelda has become one of the most well-known video game franchises around, and Sally Field has been playing since the early days of the series.

This year marked The Legend of Zelda 's 40th anniversary. It's hard for any game to become a full-blown franchise, but it's even more impressive when that legacy spans four decades. Such longevity is really hard to achieve, and it showcases the impact that The Legend of Zelda has had on both gaming and pop culture in general. The franchise's reach spans generations, and Sally Field has a charming story about how she first got into The Legend of Zelda .

Sally Field Used to Play The Legend of Zelda With Robin Williams

During a recent interview with Jake Hamilton to promote her upcoming film Remarkably Bright Creatures , Sally Field was asked what working with Robin Williams on the set of Mrs. Doubtfire was like. Field had great things to say about her time working with the late Williams, but she also shared a surprising bit of information regarding the two of them playing video games during the course of filming. The two would play early Legend of Zelda games at Field's apartment, and she's still a huge fan of the series.

Remarkably Bright Creatures premieres can be streamed on Netflix starting May 8 .

Balance the critic averages

Critical Mass

Pick games to balance the averages.

Time: 00:00
Diff: —

Scales

Multiplier ×1.00

Right

Balance the critic averages
Easy (6)Medium (8)Hard (10)

Critical Mass

Pick games to balance the averages.
Time: 00:00
Diff: —

Scales

Multiplier ×1.00
Left
Avg —
Right
Avg —
Results
0
—
More Games
Choose a game

For those who aren't aware, Robin Williams was known to be a massive Legend of Zelda fan. He even named his daughter Zelda. To honor her father, Zelda Williams streamed Breath of the Wild for charity back in 2017, raising money for the Brain & Behavior Research Foundation, an organization that researches mental illness. Robin Williams clearly had a deep connection to the series, but it was less known that he and Sally Field bonded over playing the games.

Field's gaming days didn't stop in the 90s, either. Even after all these years, she plays some of The Legend of Zelda games with her grandsons, and she still enjoys playing them when she's alone. Although she didn't really specify which entries were her favorite to dive into, she revealed that she has been playing on the Switch 2. There have been a lot of great Legend of Zelda games over the years, so it would be interesting to find out which ones she considered personal favorites.

Guess the games from the emojis.

Gamoji

Guess the game from the emojis.

Title
—
—
Clues
—
—

Sally Field has had an incredibly strong career through the years. From her Oscar-winning performances in the films Norma Rae and Places in the Heart to being Aunt May in The Amazing Spider-Man , she's maintained the same impressive longevity that The Legend of Zelda has. With The Legend of Zelda movie scheduled to come out next year, a cameo would be pretty exciting, but she hasn't been connected to the film in any way. It would be a really special full-circle moment, though. There are plenty of actors who are gamers, and Sally Field's love for Zelda is a pleasant surprise.

The Legend of Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom

Follow
Followed
Adventure
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Top Critic Avg: 85 /100 Critics Rec: 93%
Released
September 26, 2024
ESRB
E10+ For Everyone 10+
Developer(s)
Nintendo, Grezzo
Publisher(s)
Nintendo

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Save Hyrule—this time with the wisdom of Princess Zelda!

The people of Hyrule are being stolen away by strange rifts—and with a certain swordsman among the missing, it’s up to Princess Zelda to save her kingdom in the latest adventure in The Legend of Zelda™ series!

Team up with the ethereal creature Tri and use the Tri Rod to create “echoes,” which are imitations of things you find in the environment—then recreate those echoes whenever you like to solve puzzles and defeat enemies. Use echoes like water blocks to reach new heights, make bridges out of old beds, throw rocks at foes, or find your own combination of echoes to do things your way. You can even make echoes of monsters to fight at your side in combat!

Franchise
The Legend of Zelda
Genre(s)
Adventure
Platform(s)
Nintendo Switch
OpenCritic Rating
Mighty
How Long To Beat
20 Hours
Powered by

item.title: Vampire Crawlers: How to Find and Beat The Drowner (Secret Boss)
item.description:
Vampire Crawlers has various bosses in each dungeon. Players can fight mini-bosses to receive special chests or to unlock additional crawlers, and they have to beat the dungeon's main boss to unlock more stages. Besides this, there are secret bosses that they can encounter if they do a very specific thing.

Just like The Trickster, the purple reaper, players can spawn The Drowner, a blue reaper. This guide tells players what they need to know about The Drowner in Vampire Crawlers , including how to get it to appear so they can battle it and defeat it.

How to Spawn The Drowner in Vampire Crawlers

Why Does the Blue Reaper Spawn in Vampire Crawlers?

Reapers tend to spawn when players act unexpectedly in battle. In the case of The Drowner, it spawns when players end their turn one too many times without playing a single card. Players may notice that if they end a turn in Vampire Crawlers without playing any attacking card, water will appear.

To get The Drowner to spawn in Vampire Crawlers , players have to End Turn a total of four times without using any weapon cards .

How to Defeat The Drowner in Vampire Crawlers

The Drowner is a strong and bulky enemy in Vampire Crawlers . However, unlike many bosses in the game, players won't have to deal with the eye mechanic, which causes enemies to attack after a certain number of cards have been played. This means that gamers can freely complete their turn without having to fear being attacked.

Since the battle with The Drowner is underwater, players will receive water damage on top of the physical damage that the blue reaper will inflict upon them. Once gamers finish their turn, they will receive 10 percent of their maximum health as underwater damage. Then, The Drowner will hit them 12 HP .

The Drowner is quite bulky, but as long as players have enough armor cards or healing cards to get them through the constant 10 percent HP damage plus the physical attack, they should be able to wear down this menace and win the fight.

Vampire Crawlers: The Turbo Wildcard from Vampire Survivors

Follow
Followed

item.title: Star Fox Switch 2 Exclusive Release Date Officially Confirmed, But There's a Catch
item.description:
A new Star Fox game has officially been revealed after months of rumors that a new entry in the franchise was in the works. Simply titled Star Fox , the game has been confirmed to be a Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive and has a launch date of June 25, 2026. While many fans were hoping to see a brand-new entry in the franchise, the reveal trailer for Star Fox confirms that it is a remake of Star Fox 64 , with updated visuals and an online multiplayer mode.

Star Fox has seen something of a resurgence in the past month after making a surprise cameo appearance in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie , being voiced by Glen Powell. This appearance, along with the rumors that a new game was in development and planned to be released in 2026, renewed hype for a franchise that hasn't seen a brand-new game release since Star Fox Zero in 2016. With Star Fox confirmed for a Switch 2 debut in just over a month, fans won't have to wait long to experience the adventures of Fox, Falco, Peppy, and Slippy as they save the Lylat system from the evil scientist Andross.

The canceled SNES game Star Fox 2 was also finally released in 2017 on the SNES Classic.

Star Fox Officially Announced for Nintendo Switch 2 as a Remake of Star Fox 64

In a surprising move from Nintendo, a Star Fox Direct was announced and subsequently aired within about a 5-minute time frame, giving fans little time to prepare for the presentation. The presentation showed off footage from the new Star Fox game, including updated visuals and voice acting. The presentation also confirmed that the game's maps would follow the layouts of Star Fox 64 , but with updated visuals and new cutscenes.

Drag weapons to fill the grid

Loadout Logic

Tap on a weapon to rotate it or press R while dragging.

Time —
Filled 0/36

Results

0
—
More Games
Drag weapons to fill the grid
EasyMediumHard

Loadout Logic

Tap on a weapon to rotate it or press R while dragging.
Time —
Filled 0/36
Results
0
—
More Games

While some fans may be disappointed that Star Fox 64 is being remade again, after Star Fox Zero previously attempted to do the same, there does seem to be enough new content on offer to make longtime fans and series newcomers interested in picking up this entry. Star Fox will feature online PvP multiplayer via Battle Mode, with players taking on opponents as either Team Star Fox or Team Star Wolf. The Nintendo Switch 2's mouse controls are available as an option as well, with players able to aim using the mouse rather than a joystick, and two-player co-op becomes possible with one player controlling the vehicle with one Joy-Con and the other firing with another in mouse mode.

Classic Star Fox features are also included in the game, such as control of the Arwing, Landmaster, and Blue-Marine submarine, and the ability to replay stages with Challenge Mode, which adds new objectives that aren't available in the main campaign. For players really wanting to feel nostalgic, Star Fox is also compatible with the NSO N64 Controller. Perhaps the most bizarre new feature included in this game is the AR filter for Nintendo Switch 2 GameChat, allowing players to become a Star Fox character like Fox McCloud with an avatar that responds to their facial movements when paired with a compatible USB camera.

Star Fox

Followed

Developer(s)
Nintendo, Argonaut Software
